EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IFrameXform2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a Frame geodata transform.

[Guid("AE2F4FF6-4E55-43E9-96FA-F384B05E8D8C")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IFrameXform2 : IFrameXform, IGeodataXform

PutAircraftOrientation(double, double, double, double, bool)

Sets the sensor exterior orientation (rotation matrix) using aircraft orientation angles in degrees.

pitchDeg double
headingDeg double

clockwise bool

QueryAircraftOrientation(out double, out double, out double, out bool)

Queries aircraft orientation angles in degrees from the sensor exterior orientation (rotation matrix).

void QueryAircraftOrientation(out double pRollDeg, out double pPitchDeg, out double pTopOfFrameDeg, out bool pClockwise)

Parameters

pRollDeg double
pPitchDeg double
pTopOfFrameDeg double
pClockwise bool

QueryCameraAxisAngles(out double, out double)

Computes and returns the apparent position of the camera. The values for Azimuth and Elevation are in degrees.

void QueryCameraAxisAngles(out double pCameraAzimuth, out double pCameraElevation)

pCameraAzimuth double
pCameraElevation double
